text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond wins the Osaka Hai and the
crowd is in awe of her stunning performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio are among those
watching from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Kitasan Black is disappointed by her loss,
she expresses her desire to race Satono Diamond
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, she's determined to win next time.
The two promise to face off again at the spring
Tenno Sho.
